full_content:
RETIRE-SPEC-HARNESS-STATE-ROLE-ASSIGNMENTS-001 v1 - Retire harness-state/role-assignments.json.

Decision: harness-state/role-assignments.json is retired. Deletion follows referencer migration (WI-4330 through WI-4339; final deletion under WI-4336).

Rationale: Live drift evidence captured in DELIB-20260669 (registry vs mirror divergence on Antigravity harness A). No preservation path per AUQ#3 clean-delete decision.

Authorization: Retire-spec authorizes deletion under WI-4336 after migration. Prior to that WI, referencer migration MUST be complete (PAUTH forbid: delete_active_referencer_without_migration).

Successor: All read access flows through groundtruth_kb.harness_projection reading from harness-state/harness-registry.json.

Assertions: (a) file-absent: role-assignments.json does not exist post-WI-4336; (b) grep_absent: no live code references the retired path (outside whitelisted bridge/audit/packet contexts).

Related: GOV-HARNESS-STATE-SOT-CONSOLIDATION-001 (parent), DELIB-20260669.

Owner AUQ approval captured this session (Phase-1 batch AUQ 4 of 4).
